global_description: A small, slender bird with a streamlined body and pointed wings. Predominantly black plumage with a glossy sheen, contrasting with a lighter underbelly. The bird has a forked tail and a sharp, pointed beak.

part_details.plumage: Glossy black feathers covering most of the body
part_details.tail: Forked, black with a slight sheen
part_details.wings: Pointed, black with a streamlined shape
part_details.underbelly: Lighter in color, contrasting with the black upper parts

spatial_relations: The pointed wings extend from the sides of the streamlined body
The forked tail is positioned at the rear of the body
The sharp beak protrudes from the front of the head
